title: Display Screen Replacement (E3 Error Fix)
description: VCU Display replacement procedure for E3 communication error and power-on issues.

steps.title: Remove Display Screen
steps.desc: Put the flathead screwdriver between screen and stem and take off screen.

steps.title: Disconnect All Cables
steps.desc: There are five cables on display, unplug all of them. Throttle and brake lever cables are with heat shrink. Cut heat shrink with cutter.
steps.warning: Wear gloves to protect your hands from sharp edges.

steps.title: Remove Old Display & Install New One
steps.desc: Pull out the display from the stem, then put new display in.
steps.tip: There is a grommet at the bottom of the stem - it is needed to put it back properly.

steps.title: Connect All Cables
steps.desc: All plugs are different types - if it's not correct, you cannot plug them. Plug them all in.
steps.tip: There are two indicator plugs that are the same type, but red color is RIGHT and white is LEFT.

steps.title: Seal Throttle & Brake Connections
steps.desc: Throttle and brake plugs need heat shrink to protect from water.

steps.title: Final Assembly
steps.desc: Put a waterproof rubber band on display screen and put it back into the stem.
steps.warning: Don't forget the heat shrink and gasket rubber bands - common mistake!
